name: ai-linux-webapp-wrapper
description: An AI-friendly Linux Electron wrapper template for frameless webapps.

scripts.check: node --check main.js src/config.js src/url-policy.js src/create-window.js src/doctor.js scripts/doctor.js test/config.test.js test/url-policy.test.js test/doctor.test.js
scripts.verify: npm run doctor && npm run check && npm run check:shell && npm test
